# Platform and surface codes

| Code | Platform | Surfaces |
|---|---|---|
| TT | TikTok | FYP, Search, LIVE, Shop |
| YTS | YouTube Shorts | Shorts feed, Search, channel surface |
| YTL | YouTube Long-form | Home, Search, Suggested, Browse |
| IGR | Instagram Reels | Reels feed, Explore, profile grid |
| IGT | Instagram Trial Reels | Non-follower Trial Reels |
| IGS | Instagram Stories | Follower story surface |
| LIN | LinkedIn Video | Professional feed |
| XTV | X/Twitter Video | Timeline and reply context |
| PIN | Pinterest Video | Search/save surface |
| TWI | Twitch / stream clips | Clip and community surface |

## Surface-specific metric rule

Do not compare platforms by raw views only. Compare by the platform's meaningful action:

```text
TikTok: watch time, full watch, search traffic, shares, comments
YouTube Shorts: chose-to-view, engaged views, average percentage viewed, subscribers per view
Instagram Reels: average watch time, sends, saves, non-follower performance
LinkedIn: completion, comments from target roles, profile clicks
Pinterest: saves, search traffic, outbound clicks
```
